columnMapping._description: Maps HDOT crash data fields to CRASH LENS field codes
columnMapping._note: CRITICAL: data.hawaii.gov is NO LONGER the correct portal. Use highways.hidot.hawaii.gov (Socrata). Limited datasets: u3kh-tzq9 (State Jurisdiction Accidents 2015-2017), b6fq-udep (crash-related). Exact column names require API query to confirm. Fields below are from Hawaii MVAR form (DOT-1-174).

derivedFields._description: Fields that must be computed from raw data during Stage 1 (CONVERT)
derivedFields._portal_warning: Hawaii's Socrata portal moved from data.hawaii.gov to highways.hidot.hawaii.gov. Crash data coverage is LIMITED (2015-2017 for state jurisdiction roads). The CARTO-based Safety Analytics Tool at safety-tool-hidot.hawaii.gov may have more comprehensive data but uses a proprietary API.

SEVERITY._note: Hawaii MVAR uses KABCO: K=Fatal, A=Suspected Serious Injury, B=Suspected Minor Injury, C=Possible Injury, O=No Apparent Injury

roadSystems._description: Hawaii road classification for road-type filtering

crashTypeMapping._description: Maps Hawaii collision type values to CRASH LENS standard
crashTypeMapping._note: Update with actual state values from data dictionary

dataSource.name: HDOT Highways Division Portal
dataSource.dataDictionary: Hawaii MVAR Form DOT-1-174 (NHTSA). See also HDOT Safety Analytics Tool at safety-tool-hidot.hawaii.gov
dataSource._dataLimitation: State Jurisdiction Accidents dataset covers 2015-2017 only for state roads. Not a comprehensive statewide crash database.
